creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ok, let me expand a bit on my original question, then.

Why do you need a new hook to enable DEBUG.

If you want to enable DEBUG on all the ports you install, put OPTIONS_SET_FORCE=DEBUG in /etc/make.conf, and it should be enough, no need to add a new kind of hook for it.  If I'm wrong, please explain :-)
